ttl.name: VEHICLE STABILITY CONTROL SYSTEM (for ADVICS Made)

para.dtcname: Zero Point Calibration of Yaw Rate Sensor Undone
Zero Point Calibration of Acceleration Sensor Undone

content5.ptxt: The skid control ECU receives signals from the yaw rate and acceleration sensor via the CAN communication system.

The yaw rate sensor has the built in acceleration sensor and detects the vehicle's condition using 2 circuits (GL1, GL2). If there is trouble in the bus lines between the yaw rate and acceleration sensor and the CAN communication system, the DTCs U0123/62 (yaw rate sensor communication trouble) and U0124/95 (acceleration sensor communication trouble) are output.
The DTCs are also output when the calibration has not been completed.

entry.ptxt: Zero point calibration of yaw rate sensor undone.

item.ptxt: (Perform zero point calibration and check DTC.
If DTC is not output again, the sensor is normal)

entry.ptxt: When either of the following is detected:

item.ptxt: The vehicle runs in the normal mode with zero point calibration undone.
After the zero point has been obtained, the zero point voltage of the sensor is not between 2.38 and 2.62 V.
(Perform zero point calibration and check DTC.
If DTC is not output again, the sensor is normal)

atten3.ptxt: When replacing the brake actuator assembly, perform zero point calibration (See page ).

atten4.ptxt: When U0123/62, U0124/95 or U0126/63 is output along with C1210/36 or C1336/39, inspect and repair trouble areas indicated by U0123/62, U0124/95 or U0126/63 first.

testgrp.testtitle: PERFORM ZERO POINT CALIBRATION OF YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR

test1.ptxt: Perform zero point calibration of the yaw rate and acceleration sensor (See page ).
Check if the same DTCs are recorded (See page ).

entry.ptxt: DTCs (C1210/36 and/or C1336/39) are not output

item.ptxt: The DTCs are recorded because zero point calibration has not been completed.
End the procedure as the same DTCs are not recorded after completion of zero point calibration.

testgrp.testtitle: CHECK YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR INSTALLATION

test1.ptxt: Check that the yaw rate and acceleration sensor has been installed properly (See page ).

specitem.ptxt: The sensor should be tightened to the specified torque.
The sensor should not be tilted.

testgrp.testtitle: INSTALL YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR CORRECTLY
